name: Grilled Tarragon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons minced fresh tarragon, or 1/2 teaspoon dried tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread mustard on both sides of the chicken.
2. Sprinkle with black pepper.
3. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours.
4. Combine butter, lemon juice, tarragon (fresh or dried), and garlic salt in a small bowl.
5. Grill the chicken over hot coals until juices run clear, basting with the butter mixture during the last 3-5 minutes of cooking.
6. Yield: 4 servings.
